Welcome,

This site provides comprehensive guidance on modifying existing lab spaces to enable equal access to disabled students. Click on the symbols below to find out more.

Vision Impairment
Mobility Impairment
Hearing Impairment
Neurodivergent
Links provided will bring you to a third party website, owned and operated by an independent party over which STEMenabled has no control ("3rd Party Website"). Any link you make to or from the 3rd Party Website will be at your own risk. Any use of the 3rd Party Website will be subject to and any information you provide will be governed by the terms of the 3rd Party Website, including those relating to confidentiality, data privacy and security.
